goal: affine_real(Real.1, h, x) = Real.1 * x + h
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 + x2 = affine_real(x0, x2, x1) }(Real.1, x, h)
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[Real](x)
Real.1 * x + h != affine_real(Real.1, h, x)

goal: compose(f, affine_real(Real.1, h), x) = f(affine_real(Real.1, h, x))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Real, Real, Real](f, affine_real(Real.1, h), x)

goal: compose(f, affine_real(Real.1, h), x) = f(x + h)
proof: compose(f, affine_real(Real.1, h), x) != f(affine_real(Real.1, h, x))
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0(x1 + x2) = shift_fn(x0, x2, x1) }(f, x, h)

goal: shift_fn(f, h, x) = compose(f, affine_real(Real.1, h), x)
proof: compose(f, affine_real(Real.1, h), x) != f(x + h)

goal: affine_real(Real.1, h, x) = Real.1 * x + h
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 + x2 = affine_real(x0, x2, x1) }(Real.1, x, h)
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[Real](x)
Real.1 * x + h != affine_real(Real.1, h, x)

goal: continuous_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, affine_real(Real.1, h)), x)
proof: not continuous_at(f, affine_real(Real.1, h, x)) or not continuous_at(affine_real(Real.1, h), x)
not continuous_at(f, affine_real(Real.1, h, x))
continuous_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, affine_real(Real.1, h)), x)
compose[Real, Real, Real](f, affine_real(Real.1, h)) = shift_fn(f, h)
not continuous_at(f, x + h)
not continuous(affine_real(Real.1, h)) or not continuous(f)
not continuous(affine_real(Real.1, h))
continuous(compose[Real, Real, Real](f, affine_real(Real.1, h)))
compose[Real, Real, Real](f, affine_real(Real.1, h)) = shift_fn(f, h)
not continuous(f)
